privileged_info_summary: All 20 metadata claims verified. The task uses standard PPR (Points Per Reception) fantasy football scoring with correct values: 0.1 points per rushing/receiving yard, 1 point per reception, 6 points for rushing/receiving TDs, 0.04 points per passing yard (0.25 formula conversion), 4 points for passing TDs. Position constraints are standard: 1 QB, 2 RB, 2 WR, 1 TE, 1 FLEX (7 total starters). Task uses synthetic roster of 16 players (2 QBs, 5 RBs, 6 WRs, 3 TEs) created in setup_task.sh. Optimal lineup using greedy algorithm yields 148.9 total points.
